summary: Fixed ReferenceError on payroll show page by defining tunjanganLain and aligning total calculations with print.tsx. Reorganized print.tsx into a cleaner table-based slip layout: proper header, two-column employee info, semantic HTML table with section headers, hidden zero-value rows, removed empty KET column, and improved print styling. Frontend build completed successfully.
current_status: Payroll show and print pages updated. Show page JS error fixed. Print slip redesigned for cleaner layout. npm run build passed. Ready for user verification at /payroll/274 and /payroll/274/print.
